tiktok_script:
HOOK: If you've ever looked at a trading chart and thought 'I have no idea what I'm looking at' — this one's for you.

BEAT 1: Here's the reality in 2026. Prices are up. Wages haven't caught up. A lot of people are quietly looking for ways to build skills that create options — not overnight riches, just real, usable knowledge. Reading a market chart is one of those skills.

BEAT 2: That's why we built the 30-Day Elite Trading Academy. It starts from absolute zero. No jargon dumps, no assumptions. You learn how price moves, how to read charts, and how to think with discipline — all at your own pace, on your own schedule. No live sessions, no rushing.

BEAT 3: This weekend we're opening 25 founding cohort spots at a price that genuinely costs less than a dinner out. Twenty-five spots. Saturday is the cutoff. After that, founding pricing is gone.

CTA: The link is in the bio. If building a real market skill has been on your list, this is the low-risk moment to actually start. Go to smarterhustleacademy.com/start — don't sleep on it.
